chinese_text: 將欲取天下而為之，吾見其不得已。
translation_text: If any one should wish to get the kingdom for himself, and to effect this by what he does, I see that he will not succeed.
translation_text_raw: If any one should wish to get the kingdom for himself, and to effect this by what he does, I see that he will not succeed.

translation_text: The kingdom is a spirit-like thing, and cannot be got by active doing.
translation_text_raw: The kingdom is a spirit-like thing, and cannot be got by active doing.

translation_text: He who would so win it destroys it;
translation_text_raw: He who would so win it destroys it;

chinese_text: 執者失之。故物或行或隨，
translation_text: he who would hold it in his grasp loses it. The course and nature of things is such that
translation_text_raw: he who would hold it in his grasp loses it. The course and nature of things is such that

translation_text: What was in front is now behind;
translation_text_raw: What was in front is now behind;

translation_text: What warmed anon we freezing find.
translation_text_raw: What warmed anon we freezing find.

translation_text: Strength is of weakness oft the spoil;
translation_text_raw: Strength is of weakness oft the spoil;

chinese_text: 是以聖人去甚，去奢，去泰。
translation_text: The store in ruins mocks our toil. Hence the sage puts away excessive effort, extravagance, and easy indulgence.
translation_text_raw: The store in ruins mocks our toil. Hence the sage puts away excessive effort, extravagance, and easy indulgence.
